zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana le Rous於1358年6月20日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈雷斯可姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas le Rous29歲，母親Lady Anne Carrington25歲。她於大約1365年與Andrew Herle在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她於1377年住在英國英格蘭賀福爾。她去世於1422年在英國格盧斯特斯爾登利斯布恩 勞斯享年64歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana le Rous于1358年6月20日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈雷斯可姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas le Rous29岁，母亲Lady Anne Carrington25岁。她于大约1365年与Andrew Herle在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她于1377年住在英国英格兰賀福爾。她去世于1422年在英国格盧斯特斯爾登利斯布恩 勞斯享年64岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Rous
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Roux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Normand, Adrien, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Michel, Pierre, Rejean, Cecile, Clovis.
nickname for a red-haired man, from Old French ro(u)s ‘red’ (from Latin russeus).

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana le Rous was born on 20 June 1358, in Harescombe, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas le Rous, was 29 and her mother, Lady Anne Carrington, was 25. She married Andrew Herle about 1365, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She lived in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1377. She died in 1422, in Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana le Rous est née le 20 juin 1358, à Harescombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas le Rous, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Carrington, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Herle environ 1365, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1377. Elle est décédée en 1422, à Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana le Rous am 20. Juni 1358 in Harescombe, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas le Rous 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Carrington 25. Sie hat um 1365 in England, United Kingdom Andrew Herle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1377 hat sie in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1422 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana le Rous è nata il il 20 giugno 1358 nel Harescombe, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas le Rous, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Carrington, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Herle circa 1365, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1377. Morì nel 1422, nel Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana le Rousが1358年6月20日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハーエスコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas le Rousは29歳，母Lady Anne Carringtonは25歳であった。約1365年にイギリスイギリスでAndrew Herleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年にはイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女は1422年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダンティスボウルン ロウゼで64歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana le Rous(이)가 1358년 6월 20일 영국 그루스스터실르 하레스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas le Rous(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Carrington(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1365년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Andrew Herle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1377년도에 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 그루스스터실르 던티스번 루스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana le Rous nasceu em 20 de junho de 1358, em Harescombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas le Rous, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Carrington, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Herle aproximadamente 1365, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela viveu em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1377. Ela faleceu em 1422, em Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana le Rous родилась 20 июня 1358 г. в местности харескомб, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas le Rous было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Carrington, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Herle около 1365 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она жила в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1377 году. Она умерла в 1422 г. в местности дунтисбурн рус, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana le Rous nació el 20 de junio de 1358, en Harescombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas le Rous, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Carrington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Andrew Herle aproximadamente 1365, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1377. Murió en 1422, en Duntisbourne Rouse, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
